criteria.name: AI-Powered Music Generation
criteria.description: The app utilizes AI to generate original music, stems, or song ideas from text prompts or other inputs.

criteria.name: Personalized Learning/Practice
criteria.description: The app uses AI to tailor music lessons or practice exercises to the user's skill level and preferences, providing real-time feedback.

criteria.name: AI-Driven Music Analysis
criteria.description: The app analyzes music to separate tracks, identify chords, or provide insights into song structure and elements.

criteria.name: Text-to-Music Capabilities
criteria.description: The app can generate music based on text prompts, allowing users to create songs by simply describing what they want.

criteria.name: User Ratings/Reviews
criteria.description: Average rating and number of reviews from app stores and other platforms, reflecting user satisfaction.
